title: Pige UI element semantics and Development handoff map
status: UI Design owner handoff; prototype behavior is executable, production bridges remain Development-owned
rules: Every visible interactive element must have one product intent, one accessible role/name, one state owner, and one production bridge.
A prototype toast is evidence of interaction feedback only; it never proves the named production service or IPC behavior exists.
Decorative elements are marked decorative and cannot receive focus or imply an unavailable action.
Raw paths, source bodies, prompts, provider errors, credentials, commands, hashes, and internal IDs never become default UI copy.
Repeated controls use one component-family entry only when their semantics, states, and production bridge are identical.
Common glyphs come from one governed Lucide-aligned sprite; visual resemblance never changes the control's product intent or accessible name.

audit.note: The nine feedback-only controls are secondary reader/message or native-boundary affordances. All primary navigation, composer, onboarding, status, Library, reader-pane, confirmation, proposal, and Settings controls have a deterministic state transition or an explicitly named native boundary.

elements.role: presentation inside a named control or labeled content row
elements.intent: Provide one consistent visual shorthand for an already-defined product action or object.
elements.prototype_action: Resolves one of 36 governed symbols from the self-contained review cache or shared sprite; the glyph itself never owns interaction state.
elements.production_bridge: Shared Icon component with an enumerated semantic name and no arbitrary raw SVG injection

elements.intent: Reveal or hide exploration navigation without changing the active task.
elements.prototype_action: Toggles the fixed-width sidebar, binds the control to its panel with aria-controls, updates aria-expanded, and persists the user-owned session state across routes.
elements.production_bridge: Window layout preference and renderer pane state

elements.intent: Explicitly toggle always-on-top.
elements.prototype_action: Updates aria-pressed and its accessible name; the quiet off state uses a low-contrast mirrored diagonal, while the on state becomes vertical and fully legible.
elements.production_bridge: Validated always-on-top window preference

elements.intent: Return directly to Home when the sidebar is collapsed without creating browser-style history.
elements.prototype_action: Appears immediately left of the sidebar toggle only outside Home and first run; activation returns to Home and transfers focus to the composer.
elements.production_bridge: Renderer Home route action

elements.intent: Switch between Home and semantic Knowledge Tree.
elements.prototype_action: Changes the active surface without creating browser-style history controls.
elements.production_bridge: Renderer view state

elements.intent: Expand or collapse one Library group.
elements.prototype_action: Animates disclosure, updates aria-expanded, removes collapsed descendants from focus, and restores session state.
elements.production_bridge: Library tree expansion preference keyed by stable group identity

elements.intent: Open a stable Markdown page in the reading workspace.
elements.prototype_action: Preserves the current sidebar and Note Agent disclosure states while updating breadcrumb, reader title, Agent context title, and active row.
elements.production_bridge: library.open with stable page ID; never an arbitrary path

elements.intent: Open the independent stable-size Settings surface.
elements.prototype_action: Opens the requested panel in the independent Settings surface without reloading or changing the underlying workspace, records the invoking control, and transfers focus to the active Settings heading in the same frame that excludes the background.
elements.production_bridge: Settings BrowserWindow and typed settings page route

elements.intent: Open one local search surface for notes, sources, topics, and tags.
elements.prototype_action: Opens Library search without creating a second sidebar destination or browser history control.
elements.production_bridge: Renderer route to local Retrieval Service search

elements.surface: Settings shell and nested Settings flows
elements.intent: Return to Pige or move between already-defined Settings panels without creating browser history controls.
elements.prototype_action: Moves to the named Settings panel or closes Settings in place while preserving the underlying workspace and pane disclosures. Background exclusion and focus transfer are atomic; closing restores focus to the invoking entry before the Settings surface becomes hidden. Direct Settings deep links close to a safe expanded-Home fallback.
elements.production_bridge: Renderer Settings route and modal focus lifecycle

elements.intent: Quietly show familiar supported format families without presenting six false workflow choices.
elements.prototype_action: None. The legend has no pointer, keyboard, hover, or file-choice action; Add file and whole-window drop remain the real inputs.
elements.production_bridge: Static localized capability hints derived from supported ingress families

elements.intent: Preserve dropped files through the single Home ingress.
elements.prototype_action: Shows a quiet full-window drop state and attaches dropped files.
elements.production_bridge: Home-owned file submission with duplicate-turn protection

elements.intent: One ingress for ordinary conversation, questions, pasted content, URLs, and files.
elements.prototype_action: Auto-grows; Enter sends, Shift+Enter adds a newline, and active IME plus the composition-end race cannot send.
elements.production_bridge: Home Agent submit-turn contract

elements.intent: Choose one or more source files without choosing a semantic workflow.
elements.prototype_action: Opens the native file input and exposes removable attachment state.
elements.production_bridge: Native file picker and Home-owned submission

elements.intent: Choose the current enabled model while exposing only a quiet connected or unavailable signal.
elements.prototype_action: Opens one compact listbox, supports arrow-key movement and Escape, updates the current model plus green/red status dot, disables send while the selected model is unavailable, then restores focus to the switcher.
elements.production_bridge: Global Default / enabled model selection and typed provider availability

elements.intent: Submit the current text and attachments exactly once.
elements.prototype_action: Creates one visible message and clears committed draft state.
elements.production_bridge: Idempotent Home turn submission with clientTurnId

elements.intent: Show one safe provisional answer while preserving final authority.
elements.prototype_action: Shows answer text only; citations and grounding stay final-only.
elements.production_bridge: Safe draft replacement stream

elements.intent: Expose the note or source supporting a final claim.
elements.prototype_action: Displays bounded title, source type, and relevance context without raw ranking internals.
elements.production_bridge: Stable citation target open

elements.surface: Home processing files and Activity recent work
elements.intent: Reveal or collapse useful current work without creating a dashboard; Home defaults to one compact processing row.
elements.prototype_action: Toggles one compact panel, updates aria-expanded, shows at most five file rows before internal scrolling, and removes collapsed content from focus and the accessibility tree.
elements.production_bridge: Renderer-local disclosure over typed Job summaries

elements.intent: Expose the bounded progress and localized state of one visible task without duplicating status ownership.
elements.prototype_action: Publishes a named numeric value and localized aria-valuetext while the visible row remains the single task status owner.
elements.production_bridge: Typed Job summary progress projection

elements.intent: Pause, continue, or remove one visible processing item without duplicating its Job status owner.
elements.prototype_action: Updates pause state in place, preserves body-free progress copy, removes one row, recalculates the summary, and restores focus to the next safe action.
elements.production_bridge: Typed Job pause/cancel semantics; remove never implies deletion of durable source evidence

elements.intent: Open the durable result associated with one completed activity.
elements.prototype_action: Opens the Dataset result in the reading workspace.
elements.production_bridge: Activity target resolved to stable page/source/dataset identity

elements.intent: Reverse an eligible durable change while preserving its operation record.
elements.prototype_action: Replaces the action with terminal undone feedback.
elements.production_bridge: Operation undo contract

elements.intent: Deny or allow exactly one sensitive external action.
elements.prototype_action: Announces one assertive body-free decision region, starts focus on Deny, disables both actions while resolving, and replaces them with one focused terminal truth.
elements.production_bridge: Permission Broker current-action decision

elements.intent: Deny or allow one sensitive model send without saving a grant.
elements.prototype_action: Announces one assertive body-free decision region, starts focus on Don't send, and resolves to one focused one-use result.
elements.production_bridge: Model Egress Decision contract

elements.intent: Explain that the source is preserved and offer one Models action.
elements.prototype_action: Keeps one polite status and one Connect Model action.
elements.production_bridge: Conversation-owned model wait and Settings navigation
elements.owner: Home Agent Service + Model Provider Registry

elements.intent: Stop dictation or keep its editable transcript without auto-send.
elements.prototype_action: Stop retains text; Complete moves editable transcript into the composer.
elements.production_bridge: Speech Service transcript lifecycle

elements.intent: Retry only a typed retryable task while retaining the original source.
elements.prototype_action: Disables during retry and returns to the same preserved source state.
elements.production_bridge: Jobs retry contract

elements.intent: Inspect one semantic concept/topic branch and its evidence boundary.
elements.prototype_action: Renders deterministic data-driven growth from stable semantic IDs; topic weight changes branch width and canopy density. Selection updates one shared floating detail surface, automatically zooms and pans the selected node into focus, highlights its branch, and supports directional-key traversal without modal or navigation churn.
elements.production_bridge: Knowledge graph node selection using stable semantic ID

elements.intent: Search, filter, change relationship emphasis, zoom, pan, or fit the same knowledge graph without creating a second navigation surface.
elements.prototype_action: Search supersedes selected-branch dimming and focuses the first result on Enter; clearing search restores selection context. Modes preserve selection; plus/minus/fit and wheel update the canvas; reduced motion preserves every final state without spatial interpolation.
elements.production_bridge: Renderer-local graph camera over stable Knowledge Graph query results

elements.intent: Inspect evidence, backlinks, or a bounded relationship suggestion, or recover the current Knowledge Tree state.
elements.prototype_action: Routes to existing Home or returns visible bounded feedback; retry never fabricates nodes and returns focus to the restored first node.
elements.production_bridge: Typed knowledge evidence, backlink, suggestion, or index-retry action

elements.intent: Distinguish empty, rebuilding, and degraded local-index truth without implying lost Markdown.
elements.prototype_action: Shows body-free state-specific copy and one relevant recovery action only when available.
elements.production_bridge: Knowledge index availability and retry contract

elements.intent: Search notes, sources, topics, and tags from one field.
elements.prototype_action: Filters result families live and exposes an explicit empty result.
elements.production_bridge: Local search service with stable result targets

elements.intent: Open the matched note/source or inspect the matched semantic topic.
elements.prototype_action: Routes note, source, and topic results to their owning surface.
elements.production_bridge: Typed search result open action

elements.intent: Switch one Library surface among Notes, Sources, Topics, and Tags without adding duplicate primary navigation.
elements.prototype_action: Filters typed result families, preserves one search field, and updates aria-selected.
elements.production_bridge: Library Service typed family query with stable result identities

elements.intent: Distinguish local loading and typed unavailable truth without suggesting that knowledge was deleted.
elements.prototype_action: Keeps one body-free status owner and one Retry only for the unavailable state; successful retry focuses the restored search field.
elements.production_bridge: Library Service availability and retry contract

elements.intent: Choose creation or opening of a visible local vault.
elements.prototype_action: Selects exactly one choice, enables Continue, and transfers focus to the next visible step heading after navigation.
elements.production_bridge: Main-owned native folder workflow

elements.intent: Connect one model service or explicitly continue in capture-only mode.
elements.prototype_action: Routes to Models or Home missing-model truth.
elements.production_bridge: Onboarding status and Model Provider Registry
elements.owner: Vault Runtime Service + Model Provider Registry

elements.intent: Continue from a valid vault choice, preview restore, or explicitly defer setup.
elements.prototype_action: Keeps Continue disabled until a vault choice exists, routes Restore to preview, and exposes defer as an explicit capture-only path.
elements.production_bridge: Onboarding step state and first-run persistence

elements.intent: Choose clone-as-new or the stronger replace-existing restore path.
elements.prototype_action: Uses native radio semantics and keeps clone-as-new selected by default.
elements.production_bridge: Opaque restore preview token and main-owned identity mode

elements.intent: Cancel restore and return to the vault choice without applying changes.
elements.prototype_action: Returns to the vault step and never commits a restore operation.
elements.production_bridge: Onboarding restore cancel transition
elements.owner: Onboarding Service + Backup and Restore Service

elements.intent: Edit, copy, or reveal additional note actions in context.
elements.prototype_action: Returns explicit prototype feedback; no decorative dead controls.
elements.production_bridge: Typed Library edit/copy/action contracts

elements.intent: Run a contextual Agent action on selected text without losing selection context.
elements.prototype_action: Explain and Summarize prepare the Note Agent composer; other actions return explicit feedback.
elements.production_bridge: Note Agent turn with stable page ID and bounded selection

elements.intent: Open a stable saved source or cited note without exposing a raw filesystem path.
elements.prototype_action: Returns explicit saved-source or citation-open feedback.
elements.production_bridge: Source preview or Library open action using stable source/page ID

elements.intent: Ask about the open note with explicit current-note context.
elements.prototype_action: Supports IME-safe Enter, Shift+Enter, and disabled-empty send.
elements.layout_contract: The Note Agent is a focus-contained overlay drawer through 1111 px and a fixed 432 px rail only above 1111 px; opening or closing it never squeezes the Markdown reader below its governed width.
elements.production_bridge: Note Agent submit-turn contract

elements.intent: Choose the model used for the current note conversation without showing a generic context label.
elements.prototype_action: Uses the same status-dot, model-name, listbox, Escape, arrow-key, selection, and focus-return behavior as Home; unavailable selection disables send without adding another warning surface.
elements.production_bridge: Shared Agent model selector bound to the Note Agent turn
elements.owner: Provider Profile Service + Note Agent Service

elements.intent: Close the current reader task or its Note Agent pane without collapsing the persistent sidebar.
elements.prototype_action: Closes only the named pane, preserves resident sidebar state, and returns focus to the owning toggle or Home task surface.
elements.production_bridge: Renderer pane state and focus restoration

elements.intent: Copy, rate, or open secondary actions for one completed Note Agent answer.
elements.prototype_action: Returns bounded local feedback and never creates a second answer or status owner.
elements.production_bridge: Clipboard or optional answer-feedback action

elements.intent: Reject, defer, or apply one reviewable Markdown change.
elements.prototype_action: Replaces the proposal with terminal truth and changes the visible paragraph only after Apply.
elements.production_bridge: Change Proposal decision and Operation record

elements.intent: Find a Settings domain without exposing internal registry keys.
elements.prototype_action: Filters Settings navigation and opens the first match on Enter.
elements.production_bridge: Renderer-local search over localized Settings metadata

elements.intent: Open one conceptual Settings domain.
elements.prototype_action: Selects one panel, exposes aria-current=page, resets scroll, and focuses its heading.
elements.production_bridge: Settings page route

elements.intent: Change one immediate boolean preference whose ownership is named by its row.
elements.prototype_action: Updates aria-checked and localized feedback.
elements.production_bridge: Typed settings mutation; exact bridge varies by registry entry

elements.intent: Select System, Light, or Dark appearance.
elements.prototype_action: Uses one roving Tab stop; arrow keys move and select while applying the resolved theme and updating aria-checked.
elements.production_bridge: Machine-local theme preference

elements.intent: Choose one bounded visible preference from its localized row options.
elements.prototype_action: Uses native select semantics, returns localized apply feedback, and never exposes registry keys.
elements.production_bridge: Typed Settings registry mutation owned by the named domain row

elements.intent: Enter the minimum provider display, endpoint, or credential value required by the chosen flow.
elements.prototype_action: Keeps credentials masked, exposes protocol and endpoint only for Custom Provider, and never copies values into feedback.
elements.production_bridge: Provider Profile draft plus OS secret store for credentials
elements.owner: Model Provider Registry + Settings and Secrets Service

elements.intent: Choose safe clone-as-new or explicit replace-existing restore identity mode.
elements.prototype_action: Uses one roving Tab stop; arrow keys keep one selected mode and expose the stronger replace warning.
elements.production_bridge: Opaque restore preview token and main-owned apply mode

elements.selector: [data-action-label="在 Finder 中显示笔记存储"], [data-action-label="在 Finder 中显示来源文件"], [data-action-label="打开另一个仓库"], [data-action-label="创建新仓库"]
elements.intent: Reveal a canonical local storage target or enter a main-owned vault open/create flow without exposing raw paths through renderer state.
elements.prototype_action: Returns one localized pathless status owner and never substitutes a false Vault fallback for unavailable external storage.
elements.production_bridge: Vault Runtime pathless reveal and main-owned native folder workflow

elements.selector: [data-action-label="创建备份"], [data-action-label="选择恢复目标文件夹"]
elements.intent: Start a backup or apply the reviewed restore preview through the selected identity mode.
elements.prototype_action: Keeps restore behind preview and identity choice, then returns only typed pathless feedback.
elements.production_bridge: Backup Job or opaque restore preview/apply contract
elements.owner: Backup and Restore Service + Window Service

elements.selector: [data-action-label="连接 OpenAI 服务"], [data-action-label="连接自定义 Provider"]
elements.intent: Validate and commit one provider-level bootstrap connection.
elements.prototype_action: Returns localized prototype feedback without exposing endpoint, credential, or raw provider error.
elements.layout_contract: Preset rows expose only required credentials; Custom Provider protocol and endpoint controls shrink to the available Settings row at 400 px and wrap their descriptive copy without horizontal overflow.
elements.production_bridge: Model Provider Registry connect contract and secret store
elements.owner: Model Provider Registry + Settings and Secrets Service

elements.selector: [data-action-label="刷新模型列表"], [data-action-label="刷新 OpenAI 模型"], [data-action-label="重试模型列表"], [data-action-label="添加自定义模型"]
elements.intent: Refresh one provider inventory or add a manual model fallback.
elements.prototype_action: Provides visible feedback and a provider-local recovery route.
elements.production_bridge: Provider model discovery and manual model contracts

elements.intent: Open the existing provider profile for bounded connection and inventory management.
elements.prototype_action: Returns explicit transition feedback without exposing provider internals on the Models summary.
elements.production_bridge: Model Provider Registry profile navigation

elements.selector: [data-action-label="检查索引"], [data-action-label="重建索引"], [data-action-label="预览重置本地数据库"]
elements.intent: Inspect or rebuild derived local indexes, or preview a recoverable database reset without touching durable knowledge.
elements.prototype_action: Returns body-free localized feedback and keeps the destructive-looking reset behind preview.
elements.production_bridge: Index maintenance Job and review-first local database reset

elements.intent: Explain a typed discovery failure with only Retry and Add custom model recovery.
elements.prototype_action: Shows body-free localized copy and relevant actions only.
elements.production_bridge: Model Provider Registry redacted failure state

elements.intent: Diagnose, install, or repair a concrete local capability with its privacy boundary visible.
elements.prototype_action: Returns localized action feedback.
elements.production_bridge: Runtime Capability and Local Tool jobs
elements.owner: Runtime Capability Service + Local Tool Service

elements.intent: Inspect, disable, delete, or export local explainable memory.
elements.prototype_action: Returns explicit feedback while preserving review-first semantics.
elements.production_bridge: Agent Memory Service and proposal/confirmation boundary

elements.intent: Inspect scoped grants or enter explicit warning flows for broader permission modes.
elements.prototype_action: Returns visible feedback and never silently enables broader authority.
elements.production_bridge: Permission Broker settings and grant store

elements.intent: Inspect or begin a staged extension lifecycle with declared capabilities.
elements.prototype_action: Returns explicit feedback without ordinary-flow installation.
elements.production_bridge: Skill Registry or Pi Package Registry staged lifecycle
elements.owner: Skill Registry + Pi Package Registry + Permission Broker

elements.intent: Check updates or preview a local redacted support export.
elements.prototype_action: Returns localized feedback without automatic upload.
elements.production_bridge: Update Service or Diagnostics Service

elements.intent: Show every file in one bounded Home turn without selecting a processing mode.
elements.prototype_action: Renders each file as a separately labeled removable chip and keeps the batch editable before send.
elements.production_bridge: Home-owned multi-file draft and submitHomeFiles
elements.owner: Capture Service + Home Agent Service + Renderer

elements.role: button following restore preview and mode selection
elements.intent: Restore a reviewed backup as a new vault or enter the stronger replace-existing confirmation path.
elements.prototype_action: Shows only typed manifest metadata and warnings, then advances without exposing a raw destination path and focuses the next visible step heading.
elements.production_bridge: Opaque restore preview token, native destination picker, and main-owned apply contract
elements.owner: Backup and Restore Service + Window Service

elements.intent: Reveal or hide current-note Agent context independently from the Library rail.
elements.prototype_action: Changes only the aria-controls-bound right rail, preserves reader measure, traps Tab and Shift+Tab inside compact drawers, moves focus to the composer when opened, and restores focus to the toolbar when closed or dismissed with Escape.
elements.production_bridge: Renderer pane state keyed to the reading workspace
